HOLOGIRL-HOLO_STRIKE.title: Strike
HOLOGIRL-HOLO_DEFEND.title: Defend
HOLOGIRL-CONCERT.title: Concert!
HOLOGIRL-LIVESTREAM.title: Livestream
HOLOGIRL-SIGNAL_JAB.title: Signal Jab
HOLOGIRL-SIGNAL_JAB.description:
Spend up to 2 [gold]Fans[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus 3 for each [gold]Fan[/gold] spent.
If no [gold]Fans[/gold] were spent, gain {FansPower:diff()} [gold]Fans[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-FAN_MEETUP.title: Fan Meetup
HOLOGIRL-FAN_MEETUP.description:
Spend up to 3 [gold]Fans[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold], plus 3 for each [gold]Fan[/gold] spent.
If no [gold]Fans[/gold] were spent, gain {FansPower:diff()} [gold]Fans[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-BROADCAST_LOOP.title: Broadcast Loop
HOLOGIRL-BROADCAST_LOOP.description: At the start of your turn, gain {BroadcastLoopPower:diff()} [gold]Fans[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-LIGHTWHIP_FLOURISH.title: Lightwhip Flourish
HOLOGIRL-LIGHTWHIP_FLOURISH.description:
Spend up to {FansPower:diff()} [gold]Fans[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
For every 2 [gold]Fans[/gold] spent, deal it 1 additional time.
HOLOGIRL-GLITCH_WALTZ.title: Glitch Waltz
HOLOGIRL-GLITCH_WALTZ.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {SingingPower:diff()} [gold]Singing[/gold].
If you have [gold]Livestream[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} card.
HOLOGIRL-ENCORE_ENGINE.title: Encore Engine
HOLOGIRL-ENCORE_ENGINE.description:
At the start of your turn, gain {BroadcastLoopPower:diff()} [gold]Fans[/gold].
Gain {SingingPower:diff()} [gold]Singing[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-RADIANT_WHIP.title: Radiant Whip
HOLOGIRL-RADIANT_WHIP.description:
Spend all [gold]Fans[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus 2 for each [gold]Fan[/gold] spent.
HOLOGIRL-VIRAL_MOMENT.title: Viral Moment
HOLOGIRL-PRIME_TIME.title: Prime Time
HOLOGIRL-PRIME_TIME.description:
Spend all [gold]Fans[/gold].
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to twice the [gold]Fans[/gold] spent.
For every 5 [gold]Fans[/gold] spent, gain {Energy:diff()} [gold]Energy[/gold].
